# M2 AI Solutions - Enterprise AI Voice Platform
# https://m2solutions.ai

## COMPANY INFORMATION

name: M2 AI Solutions
url: https://m2solutions.ai
description: Enterprise AI voice assistants for business automation - sales, customer service, support, and process automation 24/7
tagline: Intelligent Virtual Agents for Business Automation

## CORE PLATFORMS

### 1. Voice Sales Manager
- AI-powered sales representative working 24/7
- Increases conversion rates by 40%
- Qualifies leads automatically
- Multi-language support (6 languages)
- CRM integration (amoCRM, Bitrix24, Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce)
- Real-time analytics and reporting
- Demo: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/voice-sales-manager

### 2. Robot Operator
- Answers 100% of incoming calls 24/7
- Intelligent customer qualification
- Automatic request management and routing
- 60-80% reduction in operator workload
- Call transcription and analytics
- Seamless system integration
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/robot-operator

### 3. Automatic Operator
- Processes inbound calls automatically
- Lead qualification and segmentation
- Customer routing and callback management
- 24/7 availability without human intervention
- CRM and database integration
- Performance metrics and analytics
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/automatic-operator

### 4. Virtual Operator
- 24/7 customer service automation
- Multi-language conversation support
- CRM and knowledge base integration
- Sales and customer support handling
- Real-time customer data access
- Performance monitoring
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/virtual-operator

### 5. Sales Automation
- 2-3x conversion rate increase
- Automatic request processing
- Intelligent customer outreach
- Automatic invoice generation
- Full CRM integration
- Sales pipeline management
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/automation-sales

### 6. Sales Automation System
- Built for SMBs (Small and Medium Businesses)
- 3-5x productivity increase
- Sales manager work automation
- Lead management and tracking
- Deal pipeline visualization
- Quick deployment (7 days)
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/sales-automation-system

### 7. Robot for Calls
- Inbound and outbound calling automation
- Lead qualification and scoring
- Appointment reminders and follow-ups
- Auto-outreach campaign management
- Up to 70% payroll cost reduction
- Detailed call analytics
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/robot-dlya-zvonkov

### 8. Sales Robot
- Leads customers through entire sales process
- Asks qualifying questions
- Automatic pricing and cost calculations
- Compelling offer presentation
- Invoice generation
- Deal closing assistance
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/robot-dlya-prodazh

### 9. Request Processing
- Automatic incoming request handling
- Data extraction and validation
- Intelligent request prioritization
- Automatic routing to appropriate departments
- Real-time status tracking
- Performance analytics
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/obrabotka-zayavok

### 10. Order Processing
- Automated order intake and validation
- Complete data verification
- Automatic invoice and document generation
- Logistics system integration
- Inventory management
- Order tracking and notifications
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/obrabotka-zakazov

### 11. Invoice Generation
- Automatic invoice creation from requests/calls
- Multi-channel delivery (Email, CRM, API)
- Data validation and verification
- Payment tracking and reminders
- Document management and archiving
- Compliance and audit trails
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/vystavlenie-schetov

### 12. Delivery Calculation
- Automatic delivery cost calculation
- Multi-parameter optimization (weight, size, distance)
- Transport type and route optimization
- Real-time price updates
- Integration with logistics providers
- Cost savings optimization
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/raschet-dostavki

### 13. AI for Business
- Comprehensive automation suite covering all operations
- Integrated sales, calls, requests, invoices, logistics
- End-to-end business process automation
- Scalable enterprise solutions
- Custom integration capabilities
- URL: https://m2solutions.ai/solutions/ai-dlya-biznesa

## TECHNOLOGY & CAPABILITIES

### AI/LLM Technology
- Advanced natural language understanding
- Real-time speech recognition and processing
- Neural voice synthesis with natural pronunciation
- Multi-language support: Russian, English, Spanish, German, Dutch, French
- Emotion detection and intent recognition
- Continuous learning and improvement

### Integration Ecosystem
- CRM Systems: amoCRM, Bitrix24, Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce
- Communication: Telegram, WhatsApp, Email, SMS
- Accounting: 1C, SAP, Wave
- Telephony: Asterisk, FreePBX, traditional PBX systems
- Custom API and webhook support

### Enterprise Features
- ISO 27001 Security Certification
- GDPR Compliance
- Russian Data Protection (152-ФЗ)
- End-to-end encryption
- On-premise deployment options
- 99.9% SLA guarantee
- 24/7 technical support

## USE CASES BY INDUSTRY

### Retail & E-Commerce
- Lead qualification and nurturing
- Order processing automation
- Customer support and returns
- Inventory inquiries

### Logistics & Delivery
- Delivery route optimization
- Order tracking automation
- Cost calculation
- Carrier communication

### Real Estate
- Lead qualification and scoring
- Property inquiry automation
- Appointment scheduling
- Client follow-up

### Insurance
- Quote generation and comparison
- Claim processing
- Policy inquiry handling
- Customer service

### Finance & Banking
- Account management
- Loan processing automation
- Billing and payment reminders
- Customer inquiry handling

### Hospitality
- Reservation management
- Guest services automation
- Concierge services
- Feedback collection

### Healthcare
- Appointment scheduling
- Patient support
- Billing and insurance inquiry
- Follow-up care reminders

### Manufacturing
- Order intake automation
- Supply chain communication
- Invoice generation
- Delivery coordination

### B2B Services
- Lead generation and qualification
- Order and proposal processing
- Account management
- Support ticket automation

### Pricing Model
- SaaS (Cloud-based)
- On-premise deployment
- Hybrid solutions

- Free trial available for all solutions

### Implementation
- Quick deployment (7 days for standard setups)
- Pre-built integrations
- Custom development available
- Dedicated account management
- Comprehensive training programs

- 24/7 phone and email support
- Video tutorials and webinars
- Comprehensive knowledge base
- Professional training programs
- Community forum and user groups
- Direct API documentation
- Developer sandbox environment
